docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,064.72 FILED BY ANDERSON, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBY, LORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FILED HER CLAIM PRIOR TO RENT BOARD FINAL DECISION ON APPEAL. PLAINTIFF VICTORIA ANDERSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LORA LIBBY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
